SMSLog: Logs SMS messages sent to carers or clients with event and code references. Related to company and location.
SMSLogSent: Logs outbound SMS messages sent to specific carers or clients with phone number and content. Related to carer and client.
smsTags: Defines named tags for SMS template organisation per company/location. Referenced by smsTemplatesSaved.
smsTemplatesSaved: Stores saved SMS message templates with tag references per company/location. Standalone.
sortPreferred: Caches distance-based preferred carer sort order for clients. Related to client and carer.
sqlLog: Logs specific SQL requests made on sensitive pages for audit purposes. Related to carer and client.
sso_configurations: Stores SSO (Single Sign-On) integration configuration per company/location, including tenant/client credentials and branding. Standalone integration config.
stageGoalSectionPRSB: Stores PRSB-format care plan stage goal entries linked to actions, with status, outcome, and comments. Related to careplanTakenPRSB and client.
state: Lookup table of named state labels (e.g. active, inactive) used for carer and client status. Referenced by status and carer.
staticEvents: Caches recurring schedule event instances for a specific date for fast schedule display. Related to recurr, client, and carer.
staticInfo: Caches dashboard summary counts (active clients, carers, admins, today's events) per location. Related to location.
status: Defines named status types for clients or carers with colour, state, leave flag, and alert settings. Referenced by statusPick and carer/client.
statusChangeEventsRemoved: Logs visit events that were removed when a client status changed, including job type and duration. Related to client and carer.
statusChangeEventsRemovedCarer: Logs visit events removed when a carer status changed. Related to client and carer.
statusChangeHrsCal: Stores holiday entitlement calculations triggered by carer status change events, including weekly hours and leave calculation. Related to carer.
statusChangesSet: Logs status change assignment events for clients. Related to client and status.
statusPick: Records the history of status changes for clients or carers, including previous and new status, date, reason, and note. Related to client, carer, and status.
systemLabels: Stores customised UI label overrides for system terminology per company/location, such as client/carer names, field labels, and section headings. Related to company and location.
tabPermissionCustom: Controls visibility of custom profile tabs per status at a company/location level. Related to status and cmTabClient/cmTabCarer.
tabPermissionGeneral: Controls visibility of standard profile tab sections (overview, notes, tasks, etc.) per status at a company/location level. Related to status.
tabPermissionLog: Audit log of changes made to tab permission configurations. Related to company and location.
tag: Defines named tags for carers or clients with colour coding and side visibility flags. Referenced by tagPick and clientCarerTags.
tagCategory: Lookup table of tag category names. Referenced by tag.
tagOutcomeLink: Links tags to outcomes for workflow triggering. Related to tag and outcome.
tagPick: Assigns tags to specific clients or carers, with optional qualification and super-tag references. Related to carer, client, and tag.
tagPickPending: Staging table for tag assignments awaiting approval. Related to carer, client, and tag.
tasks: Legacy table storing named task items for clients per company/location. Related to client.
teaSetup: Configures tea break rules for specific clients, including event minute thresholds and pay flags. Related to client.
timePeriods: Defines named time periods (e.g. morning, afternoon) with start and end times per company/location. Referenced by medication and task assignment times.
timesheet: Core table recording all carer visit clock-in/out records with GPS, duration, pay, billing, travel, and lock status. Central table referenced by invoices, payroll, and reports.
timesheetBatch: Links timesheet records to batch processing jobs. Related to timesheet and batch.
timesheetCustomId: Assigns a unique custom sequential ID to timesheet records for reference. Related to timesheet.
timesheetDelete: Archives deleted timesheet records with deletion metadata for audit and recovery. Related to carer and client.
timesheetDetails: Stores denormalised timesheet summary data per event for reporting, including billing and pay values. Related to timesheet.
timesheetEdit: Stores pre-edit snapshots of timesheet records before modification, enabling change tracking. Related to carer and client.
timesheetInvestigation: Records timesheet investigation cases raised for specific visits, with resolution tracking. Related to timesheet and client.
timesheetJobtypeChange: Logs job type changes made to existing timesheet records with old and new values. Related to timesheet.
timesheetLocationAccuracy: Logs GPS accuracy readings captured during timesheet clock events. Related to timesheet.
timesheetSignOff: Stores digital signature data captured during timesheet sign-off. Related to company and location.
timesheetSignOffDetails: Links timesheet records to carer and admin signatures captured at sign-off. Related to timesheet and carerSignatures.
timesheetToday: Temporary or cached table storing today's timesheet records for fast dashboard display. Related to carer and client.
timesheetTravel: Stores detailed travel records per timesheet including distance, GPS coordinates, expense, and pay values. Related to timesheet.
timesheetTravelUpdated: Stores updated travel recalculation records for timesheets after recalculation. Related to timesheet.
timesheet_bill_pay: Stores pre-calculated billing and pay breakdown data for timesheets, including rate breakdowns and scale references as JSON. Related to timesheet.
timesheet_saturn_ids: Maps timesheet records to their Saturn integration IDs for third-party export. Related to timesheet.
todo: Legacy todo/task records for clients or carers with priority, status, and medication linkage. Related to client and carer.
todoHistory: Audit history of changes to todo record status, priority, and assigned person. Related to todo.
todoLog: Stores free-text log notes added to todo records. Related to todo.
todo_associated: Links todo records to associated carers or clients for notification and view tracking. Related to todo.
todo_details_history: Audit log of changes to the details field of a todo record. Related to todo.
todo_issue: Defines todo issue types with prefixes, mandatory flags, and notification settings. Referenced by todo.
todo_issue_subtask: Defines ordered subtask templates for todo issue types. Referenced by todo_issue_subtask_items.
todo_issue_subtask_items: Tracks subtask instance status and progress within a specific todo record. Related to todo and todo_issue_subtask.
todo_issue_subtask_status: Defines status options for todo subtask items. Referenced by todo_issue_subtask_items.
todo_notes: Stores free-text notes attached to todo records. Related to todo.
todo_subject_history: Audit log of changes to the subject field of a todo record. Related to todo.
todo_upload: Stores file attachments linked to todo records or subtask items. Related to todo.
trainingSession: Records training session instances with dates, duration, attendee data, and sign-off details. Related to trainingSessions.
trainingSessions: Defines training session templates with configurable field schemas stored as JSON. Referenced by trainingSession.
travel: Lookup table of travel mode names. Referenced by timesheet travel calculations.
travelDistance: Caches calculated travel distances and times between client location pairs with transport category. Referenced by timesheet travel.
travelDistanceCarerBaseClient: Caches calculated distances from a carer's base location to client locations. Related to carer and client.
travelDistanceCarerClient: Caches calculated distances from a carer's current location to client locations. Related to carer and client.
travelTimeSchedule: Caches scheduled travel journey times between origin and destination points by transport mode. Related to company and location.
uniqueCode: Stores single-use codes with usage timestamps for one-time actions or invitations. Standalone.
updatedField: Logs field-level changes made to client or carer records, capturing old and new values. Related to client and carer.
updatedFieldType: Defines the types of field updates that can be tracked, referencing source tables. Referenced by updatedField.
upload: Generic file upload store with raw binary content. Standalone.
users: Laravel application user table with email credentials and email verification. Referenced by sessions.
v2AnswerAssessmentLink: Links v2 assessment answers to follow-on assessments with allocation options. Related to v2AssessmentAnswers.
v2AnswerChartLink: Links v2 assessment answers to charts with schedule and directive mode configuration. Related to v2AssessmentAnswers.
v2AnswerProgressNoteLink: Links v2 assessment answers to progress note category and reason triggers. Related to v2AssessmentAnswers.
v2AssessmentAnsFlagLink: Links v2 assessment answers to clinical flags. Related to v2AssessmentAnswers and nhFlags.
v2AssessmentAnsTaken: Records individual answer submissions within a v2 assessment taken instance, with lock and deselect support. Related to v2AssessmentTaken and v2AssessmentQuestions.
v2AssessmentAnswers: Defines selectable answer options for v2 assessment questions with scoring and prepopulated sentences. Related to v2AssessmentQuestions.
v2AssessmentQCategories: Lookup table of question category types for v2 assessments. Referenced by v2AssessmentQuestions.
v2AssessmentQuestionLink: Links questions to v2 assessments with section, order, and shared option configuration. Related to v2Assessments and v2AssessmentQuestions.
v2AssessmentQuestions: Defines reusable v2 assessment questions with type, risk level, role restriction, and follow-on support. Referenced by v2AssessmentQuestionLink.
v2AssessmentQuesTypes: Lookup table of question types for v2 assessments. Referenced by v2AssessmentQuestions.
v2AssessmentRoles: Links v2 assessments to staff roles, restricting access by role. Related to v2Assessments and rcRoles.
v2Assessments: Defines v2 assessment templates with versioning, scoring, review periods, and area scope. Referenced by v2AssessmentTaken and v2AssessmentQuestionLink.
v2AssessmentScoreThresholds: Defines score range thresholds with result messages for v2 assessment scoring. Related to v2Assessments.
v2AssessmentSectionTypes: Lookup table of section type names used within v2 assessment structures. Referenced by v2AssessmentQuestionLink.
v2AssessmentTaken: Records completed v2 assessment instances for clients with lock, archive, and review date tracking. Related to v2Assessments and client.
v2AssessmentTakenSnapshot: Stores snapshot file references generated when a v2 assessment is completed or signed off. Related to v2AssessmentTaken and carer.
v2FollowOnQuestions: Defines follow-on question triggers based on specific answer selections in v2 assessments. Related to v2AssessmentAnswers and v2AssessmentQuestions.
v2QuestionRolesLink: Links v2 assessment questions to staff roles for role-restricted visibility. Related to v2AssessmentQuestions and rcRoles.
v2QuestionScoreThresholds: Defines score range thresholds per question for v2 assessment scoring. Related to v2AssessmentQuestions.
video_sessions: Stores video call session records with meeting ID, host, client, and URL details. Related to client.
view_events: Denormalised event view table used for schedule reporting, storing visit dates, times, and job types. Related to recurr, client, and carer.
view_finance: Denormalised finance view table used for billing and pay reports, storing fully resolved visit financial data per event. Related to timesheet, client, and carer.
view_finance_error_log: Logs discrepancies found between timesheet and view_finance record counts during reconciliation checks. Related to company.
view_finance_log: Logs view_finance regeneration jobs with date ranges, record counts, and completion status. Related to company.
vpn_whitelist: Stores whitelisted VPN IP addresses and associated usernames for access control. Standalone security table.
walletSignOff: Stores digital signatures captured when a client wallet transaction is signed off. Related to client.
workPhone: Stores work phone numbers assigned to carers with activation link and SMS sent tracking. Related to carer.
